name: Demi-Human Refuge Region
description: A remote region where demi-humans hide from human slavers, filled with monster threats from nearby dungeons.

name: Demi-Human Refuge Village
description: Blue's home village near the Cave of Spilled Crystals, constantly threatened by dungeon overflows.

name: Skyward Tower City
description: A city built around a massive tower, serving as an adventurer and trade hub.

name: Core Tree of Life
description: The chamber at the planet's core where the true Tree of Life and its Guardian reside.

name: Road to Skyward Tower City
description: Trade and adventurer route linking the demi-human region to the Skyward Tower City.

name: Ironcross Town
description: Small town along the road to Skyward Tower City; waystation and guild outpost.
